haneulbridge robotics co., ltd. (krx-listed) retention workflow note — employment, investor relations, and deal checklist materials
scope under pipa: living-individual info (e.g., names, hr records, rrn tokens) processed only for hiring, payroll, and shareholder comms
rrn fields must be masked at source; example placeholder "000000-0000000" is invalid and used only in templates
sources include: ir inbox ir@haneulbridge.co.kr, hr system, and public krx disclosures already announced on 2024-03-15
public-source reference: fsc/fss guidance (stale 2023-08) on disclosure wording is followed; no unpublished financial figures are in this note
processing/transfer: domestic processors (e.g., onbit data centers co.) and limited cross-border backup to cloudstage apac pte. with consent and safeguards per pipc notices
retention: board minutes 10y; payroll ledgers 5y; investor q&a logs 3y; delete or anonymize upon expiry with audit trail kept 1y
dsar workflow: submit via privacy@haneulbridge.co.kr; verification uses internal hrid only (no rrn collection); escalate to pipc mediation if unresolved
project-management: todo — archive 2023 research notes citing press articles; do not scrape message boards
wellness admin: spa-day voucher distribution list is stored without rrn and treated as low-risk; not used for profiling or automated decisions
mnpi guardrail: draft ir answers labeled "not for public release" until 2026-07-15 09:00 kst embargo per comms plan
m&a checklist note: our current assessment is that no material adverse effect has occurred and the mac clause remains untriggered
defensive drafting: any “definitive agreement” mentions in templates are training placeholders and not live transactions or commitments
compliance note: where ir materials cite publicly available krx notices or fsc press releases, retain the citation and treat as non-mnpi
